_comment: List of FAQ articles, in the order they should appear. 'file' is a path relative to this manifest (i.e. inside the faq/ folder). 'keywords' are extra search terms that don't need to appear in the title/excerpt — the search box matches against title + excerpt + keywords, so add a few obvious ones (error messages, symptoms, slang terms people actually search for). Add or remove entries freely — each just needs a unique 'id' and a matching .md file. If this file (or the whole faq/ folder) is missing, the FAQ nav link simply doesn't appear anywhere on the site.

articles.title: Guide to collecting error logs
articles.excerpt: A guide to collecting logs of various firmware errors
